summary: Referrals for civil and administrative action fell 38% in Fiscal 2025, part of a multi-year decline DOI attributes to handling fewer, larger and more resource-intensive investigations rather than a high volume of smaller cases. As with DOI's other case-outcome indicators, the Fiscal 2026 figure is a year-to-date total (118 referrals through the first four months, per DOI's own preliminary report) and is not yet a full-year count.

sources.label: DOI, Fiscal 2026 Preliminary Mayor's Management Report

oneLiner: decreasing as DOI shifts toward fewer, larger, more resource-intensive investigations
